sub_home_grouped: A open  ▶ pin/unpin  Y add repo  - search  L/R tabs  ZL/ZR page
sub_home_flat: A open  Y add repo  X edit  ▶ pin  - search  L/R tabs  ZL/ZR page
sub_repos: A browse  X edit  Y add repo  ▶ pin  - search  L/R tabs  B back
sub_files: A get  - search  Y filter  X sort  ◀▶ repo  L/R tabs  B back
free_space_warn: Warning: total size exceeds free space.
fat32_warn_msg: This file is 4 GB or larger and won't save correctly on a FAT32 SD card. It will work only if your card is formatted exFAT. Download anyway?
sub_queue: A cancel  X retry  ZL/ZR move  ◀ top ▶ bottom  Y menu  - log  B back
queue_empty_hint: Add downloads from the Browse tab
sub_settings: A select  L/R tabs  ZL/ZR page
sub_ext_filter: A toggle  X remove  B back
add_ext_prompt: Enter a file extension to hide (e.g. nfo)
ext_filter_info: Hidden file types won't appear in the Browse file list.
group_consoles: Group console repos on browse tab: %s
roms_override_warn: This becomes the folder where ROMs are downloaded and browsed. Point your emulators at this folder so your games show up. See the wiki for per-emulator setup.
sub_rom_picker: A open  X use this folder  Y default  B up
roms_use_root_warn: Choose a subfolder, not the SD-card root.
sub_downloads: Y select  - delete  X delete all  B back
delete_all_confirm: Delete ALL %d file(s) in the downloads folder?
dl_active_warn: %d download(s) are active and will be cancelled.
dl_queue_warn: Some are in the download queue and will be cancelled.
sub_installed: A open  ◀ sort  ▶ pin  - search  L/R tabs  B back
sub_installed_folder: A open  Y select  X rename  ◀ sort  ▶ delete  - search  L/R tabs  B back
move_up_multi: Move these %d items up to the parent folder?
empty_folder_delete: "%s" is empty now. Delete this folder?
sub_log: A view  X clear log  B back
sub_manage: A show/hide  L/R tabs  B back
clear_creds_confirm: Remove the saved access key and secret?
update_dl_cancel: Downloading update - press B to cancel
update_ok:
Update installed — v%s.

Close and relaunch HaulNX.
controls_body:
Tabs: L / R  (Browse | Installed | Queue | Settings)
Navigate: D-pad (hold to repeat)   ZL/ZR: page
+: exit   B: back
Browse: A open  Y add  X edit/del  - search
Files: A get  - search  Y filter  X sort  ◀/▶: repo
Queue: A cancel  X retry  ZL/ZR move  Y clear  - log
lang_restart: Language changed. Relaunch HaulNX for full effect.
no_network_msg:
No internet connection detected.

Please enable Wi-Fi in System Settings
to browse and download.
sub_search: A download  Y new search  B back
sub_cache: X delete all  - delete  B back
waiting_network: Offline - downloads resume when the network returns
sub_debug_log: A view  X clear log  B back
sub_queue_state: A view  X clear  B back
clear_queue_confirm: Delete the saved download queue data?
sub_inst_search: A open  Y new search  B back
sub_home_cards: A open  X pin  Y add repo  - search  L/R tabs  ZL/ZR page
sub_home_flat_cards: A open  X edit  Y add repo  - search  L/R tabs  ZL/ZR page
sub_installed_cards: A open  X pin  - search  L/R tabs  B back
sub_queue_cards: A cancel  X retry  ZL/ZR move  Y menu  - log  B back
sub_import: Waiting for a file...  B cancel
import_steps:
1.  Open the address above in a browser on this network
2.  Choose the dl_sources.json you exported
3.  Send it, then confirm the import here
import_repo_note: Or push straight from the app utility on GitHub
import_bad_file: That file has no collections in it.
import_confirm:
Replace your collections with %d console(s) and %d repo(s)?
Your current list is kept as dl_sources.bak.json.
import_save_fail: Couldn't save. Your collections are unchanged.
update_how: Where should the update come from?
update_wifi_steps:
1.  Open the address above in a browser on this network
2.  Drop a HaulNX .nro on the page — or push from the app utility (Send to Switch › App update)
3.  Send it, then confirm the install here
nro_confirm:
Replace the installed app with this build?

Received: v%s (%s)
Installed: v%s

The swap happens on the next launch; the current build is kept as a backup.
nro_stage_fail: Couldn't stage the build. The installed app is unchanged.
nro_staged: Build v%s is staged. It replaces the app the next time HaulNX starts.
restore_pick: Which one do you want to go back to?
restore_confirm:
Go back to %d console(s) and %d repo(s)?
Your current list is kept, so you can swap back.
welcome_body:
HaulNX starts empty — you decide what goes in it.

Send a collection from a computer on your network, or add a repo by hand.
